evals.name: deploy-contract
evals.prompt: I have a Solidity 0.8.26 contract at src/Counter.sol. Deploy it to Taiko mainnet using Foundry.
evals.expected_output: Should use FOUNDRY_PROFILE=taiko or --evm-version shanghai, correct RPC, and verify on taikoscan

evals.name: evm-compatibility
evals.prompt: I'm getting a weird revert when deploying my contract on chain 167000. It works fine on Sepolia. I'm using OpenZeppelin v5 contracts.
evals.expected_output: Should identify Shanghai EVM limitation, mention transient storage issue with OZ v5, suggest evm_version fix

evals.name: network-config
evals.prompt: Add Taiko mainnet and testnet to my wagmi config. Need chain IDs, RPCs, and explorers.
evals.expected_output: Should provide correct chain IDs (167000, 167013), correct RPC URLs, correct explorer URLs

evals.name: bridge-tokens
evals.prompt: How do I bridge ERC20 tokens from Ethereum to Taiko programmatically? What contracts do I need to interact with?
evals.expected_output: Should reference correct Bridge and ERC20Vault addresses on L1, explain sendToken flow

evals.name: verification
evals.prompt: My contract is deployed at 0xabc123 on Taiko but I can't verify it. What's the right endpoint and command?
evals.expected_output: Should use https://api.taikoscan.io/api as verifier URL, correct forge verify-contract syntax
